title: Swords tools and armors
description:
A mod that adds swords, armor, tools and dimensions


My first mod
body:
# 🛡️ Swords, Tools and Armors

**A mod that adds new swords, tools, armors, and dimensions to completely expand your Minecraft adventure!**

---

## ⚔️ Swords  
Adds a variety of unique swords, created with imagination and power.  

**Currently available:**
- **Extreme Sword** – A powerful sword, stronger than most.  
- **THE Sword** – An extremely strong sword, made for the toughest battles.

---

## ⛏️ Tools  
Includes pickaxes, axes, and more tools with high performance.  

**Currently available:**
- **Extreme Pickaxe** – Much more efficient than netherite tools.

---

## 🛡️ Armors  
Upgrade your defense with special and themed armors.  

**Currently available:**
- **Ice Armor** – A frosty set, but not very strong.  
- **Extreme Armor** – Offers great protection.  
- **THE Armor** – A legendary armor set with exceptional defense.

---

## 🌌 Dimensions  
Explore new dimensions and discover completely different worlds!  

**Currently available:**
- **New World** – A mysterious new dimension *(still in development)*.

---

*More content coming soon! Stay tuned for updates.*
